chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-992 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 02-07-2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ali Jatoi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G a/w Majid Ali Mako, Assistant Commissioner, Salehpat and SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur. ****** Comments/statements filed by respondents No.7,8,9.10 and Assistant Commissioner, Salehpat are taken on record and copies whereof are handed over to learned counsel for the petitioner. Assistant Commissioner, Salehpat is present and submits that grievance of the petitioner has been addressed, which is affirmed by learned counsel for the petitioner. Hence, with consent of the parties including learned AAG, instant petition is hereby disposed of in the terms of comments, filed today. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
